heading: Employment opportunities for family members
label: 2699 Employment opportunities for family members
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Feb. 15, 1981section 2403 of Pub. L. 96–465section 3901 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: In order to expand employment opportunities for family members of United States Government personnel assigned abroad, the Secretary of State shall seek to conclude such bilateral and multilateral agreements as will facilitate the employment of such family members in foreign economies.
would violate any law of such country or of the United States; or
could, as certified in writing by the United States chief of mission to such country, damage the interests of the United States.
